generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While the government pushes for more civil defense spending, experts warn that over-preparation can actually make us LESS safe. 'Over-reliance on civil defense measures creates a false sense of security, leaving us vulnerable to new threats,' says Dr. Helen Carter, a leading national security analyst. Let's focus on real, balanced solutions instead of panic-driven spending. #SmartSecurity #CivilDefense
